waivers.reason: Network trust-boundary encoding has been moved to the bounded HNW1/postcard codec. Remaining uses are consensus/proof artifact compatibility surfaces and must move behind versioned canonical codecs before this waiver expires.
Transitive through sled. Hegemon does not use fxhash as a cryptographic hash; remove by replacing or upgrading the node storage dependency.
Transitive through parking_lot 0.11 via sled/reed-solomon-erasure. Remove by lifting those dependencies to parking_lot 0.12+ paths.
Transitive macro dependency through arkworks/RISC0/Plonky3. It is not a runtime trust-boundary parser; remove with upstream dependency lifts.

The advisory is for the opt-in ARMv8 assembly backend. This build path does not enable that backend, but keccak 0.1.5 also remains yanked and must be removed by moving sha3/merlin dependents off this version.
Yanked keccak 0.1.5 remains through sha3 0.10 and merlin. Remove by lifting dependents to the keccak 0.2 line or replacing the path.
No code in this repo uses the affected custom-logger rand::rng path for protocol randomness. Migrate remaining rand 0.8 users to rand 0.9 or direct rand_core/getrandom calls.
No code in this repo uses the affected custom-logger rand::rng path for protocol randomness. Track upstream fix and pin once released.
